E, cm-1	Sigma_00, cm2	Sigma_01, cm2	Sigma_02, cm2	Sigma_10, cm2	Sigma_11, cm2	Sigma_12, cm2	Sigma_20, cm2	Sigma_21, cm2	Sigma_22, cm2
